1. For serialization I'm using serde -- it's amazing how it generates all the boilerplate at compile time with derive macros. Serde JSON parsing is incredibly fast. (importance: 7/10, subgraph)

4. I also pulled in clap for argument parsing. The derive API is really clean -- you just annotate your struct fields and it generates the entire CLI interface. (importance: 7/10, subgraph)
